channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Gas canister discarded, 18th April
item.description:
This canister was been discarded about 2 weeks ago.

item.title: Debris in road affecting road users, 18th April
item.description:
Building materials in road Causing drivers to swerve due to not being an easy hazard to spot early on. On junction of Carlton Road and brook street Erith

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 283, Brook Street, Northumberland Heath, Greater London

Can this please be removed?

item.title: Dead baby fox on street, 18th April

Theres a dead baby fox laying on the street

item.title: Knocked over bollard and damaged pavement left for months, 18th April
item.description:
A stone bollard was knocked over months ago, damaging the pavement in the process. Yellow plastic barriers were put up but no one has come to repair the bollard and it’s quite an eye sore.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 98, Totteridge Lane, Whetstone, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on the street, 18th April
item.description:
Please see litter on the street. Probably due to foxes

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stratheden Parade, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 18th April
item.description:
Around 12 this afternoon (17/04/2026) 3 men in a white van with compony logo (chequers) got out and started dumping rubbish from the back of the van Compony van: chequers Registration: ma24xtf

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Geffrye Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole N/B carrigeway, 18th April
item.description:
Large pothole getting worse. Buses are grounding vehicles whilst going over the affected area.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Edmund Halley Way, Greenwich

item.title: Dumped metal cabinet next to red letter box, Church Lane, 18th April
item.description:
Dumped metal cabinet next to red letter box on green verge in Church Lane opposite Church.. Can this be taken away please. Thank you.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Lane, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: FAO Bexley Council .The cycle lane road markings have faded / worn away / missing. New updates on The cycle lane road markings have worn out and some are completely missing. Needs urgent repainting for safety Your report has been investigated by our team and this is not the responsibility of Transport for London. However, your local borough will be able to help you. Should you need anything else please contact our customer services team on 0343 222 1234 State changed to: not TfL’s responsibility TfL, 18th April
item.description:
The cycle lane road markings have faded / worn away / missing. New updates on The cycle lane road markings have worn out and some are completely missing. Needs urgent repainting for safety Your report has been investigated by our team and this is not the responsibility of Transport for London. However, your local borough will be able to help you. Should you need anything else please contact our customer services team on 0343 222 1234 State changed to: not TfL’s responsibility TfL
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bourne Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two large plastic containers of petrol left in school hedge, 18th April
item.description:
Hazardous items: Two large plastic containers with white plastic screw tops left in small gap of school hedge, LOOKS TO CONTAINING PETROL. Nearby lamppost 104/2 C, also blue & green signage about switching of car ignition on lamppost and opposite house No.28 Church Lane. Petrol is a hazardous product and can combust. On the edge of pavement and busy with school foot fall. Can this report be treated as urgent please. Thank you. Tried Emergency team but closed until Monday morning. Petrol should not be stored in a school hedge.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Lane, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big tree fallen, 18th April
item.description:
Large amount of tree has fallen in hall place north
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mount Pleasant Walk, Coldblow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
